prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O2 (6.6L V12 twin-turbo, 563hp stock) – Full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with custom fuel and ignition maps optimized for 98 RON + E85 flex-fuel blend, paired with a bespoke AEM 30-0334 wideband O2 controller for closed-loop AFR targeting 11.8:1 under full load. Upgraded fuel system includes twin Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps (340 LPH each) and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (1,700cc/min) to support 750whp on E50.

Forced Induction: Stock turbos replaced with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (88mm compressor wheels, .96 A/R turbine housings) on custom 3D-printed Inconel 625 exhaust manifolds by CPP Performance. Turbochargers are mated to a custom TiAL Sport MV-R 60mm wastegate setup with dual 44mm ports and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves. Intercooling system features a PWR Australia 1200hp front-mount intercooler with 4.5" core thickness and dual 4" silicone couplers, reducing IATs by 45°C at 2.2 bar boost.

Drivetrain & Handling: ZF 8HP90 transmission upgraded with a Punch Powerglide Stage 3 valve body and Sonnax billet torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) for 0.15s faster shifts. Rear differential features a Quaife ATB helical LSD with 40% lockup under load. Suspension is fully replaced with a KW Automotive Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm ride height adjustment) and Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in progressive-rate springs. Braking system includes AP Racing CP9660 6-piston calipers with 420mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X compound) and Ferodo DS3000 pads for 1.2g deceleration.
estetica: Bodywork: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk LB-WORKS, featuring extended front fenders (35mm per side), rear quarter panels (50mm per side), and a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated Vortex Generators. Rear diffuser is a custom 5-piece unit by RW Carbon, incorporating dual 4" titanium exhaust outlets (custom fabrication by Akrapović) and an active Gurney flap for downforce adjustment.

Aerodynamics: Custom 3D-printed titanium rear wing by 996TT Designs, modeled after the Ferrari FXX-K Evo’s swan-neck design, with a 1,800mm span and 300mm chord. Wing features dual electric actuators for 0-25° angle adjustment and generates 220kg of downforce at 200 km/h. Front canards by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and a custom underbody aero package with 5 vortex generators and a rear diffuser extension by APR Performance.

Interior & Lighting: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Saddleback Leather, including custom Recaro SPG XL seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses) and a bespoke roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 8-point design with integrated fire suppression system). Lighting includes a full LED conversion by LUX Automotive with Osram Oslon Black Flat LEDs (6,500K) and a custom laser-etched Rolls-Royce Spirit of Ecstasy emblem in the headlights (animated startup sequence).
